title: micrachne obtusiflora
intro: Micrachne obtusiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Micrachne obtusiflora include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
